description: In the ERP, Item can be a product or a service with its own price. For instance, if you have "credit-hour" with different prices per level, you should create more than one item. For instance, "Credit-hour - Masters" and "Credit-hour - Bachelors." You may have as many items as your seminary needs. Note that we still can have more than one price list, so if your have "Credit-hour - Masters" with different prices for national and international students , that should be addressed with different price lists, NOT different items.
name: ERP Item
title: List the things you charge for
